zh.lifeSummary: 當William Reade於大約1425年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴頓時，他的父親Edmund Robert Rede Sr34歲，母親Christina James25歲。他於大約1450年與Joan Pitway在英國英格蘭越可爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1466年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Reade于大约1425年出生在英国英格兰越可爾巴頓时，他的父亲Edmund Robert Rede Sr34岁，母亲Christina James25岁。他于大约1450年与Joan Pitway在英国英格兰越可爾巴頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1466年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Reade was born about 1425, in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Robert Rede Sr, was 34 and his mother, Christina James, was 25. He married Joan Pitway about 1450, in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1466, in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Reade est né environ 1425, à Barton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Robert Rede Sr, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Christina James, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Pitway environ 1450, à Barton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1466, à Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Reade um 1425 in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Robert Rede Sr 34 und seine Mutter Christina James 25. Er hat um 1450 in Barton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Pitway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1466 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Reade è nato il circa 1425 nel Barton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edmund Robert Rede Sr, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Christina James, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Pitway circa 1450, nel Barton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1466, nel Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Readeが約1425年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Edmund Robert Rede Srは34歳，母Christina Jamesは25歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバートンでJoan Pitwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1466年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアボアルスタルで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアボアルスタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Reade(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Robert Rede Sr(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina James(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바턴에서 Joan Pitway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 보르스탤에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 보르스탤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Reade nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Robert Rede Sr, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Christina James, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Pitway aproximadamente 1450, em Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1466, em Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Reade родился около 1425 г. в местности бартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Robert Rede Sr было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Christina James, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Pitway около 1450 г. в местности бартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1466 г. в местности боарсталл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности боарсталл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Reade nació aproximadamente 1425, en Barton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Robert Rede Sr, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Christina James, tenía 25 años.
